document.name: Chez Snacky
document.shortDescription: Belgian fries and coffee by Flórián tér — quick bites near Main Square Óbuda transport hub.
document.longDescription:
Chez Snacky at Flórián tér serves Belgian-style frites and coffee beside the Óbuda metro and HÉV junction. A fast stop before exploring Main Square markets. Hours on chezsnacky.hu.

Sources: https://www.chezsnacky.hu/
